about.heading: Real-time weather monitoring for Central Greece
about.intro: FWM is a real-time weather monitoring platform dedicated to Central Greece. The network of professional weather stations that are supported by various organizations delivers live meteorological data for Fthiotida and the surrounding regions, helping residents, farmers, businesses, and visitors make informed decisions every day.
about.networkText: The weather station network that is supported by FWM is part of the National Observatory of Athens, Weather Underground, Weather Cloud, EUweather & MeteoIot. It spans Central Greece from coastal lowlands to mountain peaks. Each station continuously records temperature, wind speed and direction, humidity, atmospheric pressure, and precipitation, streaming live data to our platform around the clock. All readings are displayed in real time so you always have the most current picture of local conditions.
about.forecastsText: Alongside live observations, FWM publishes detailed hourly weather forecasts for the major cities and towns of Central Greece and parts of the surrounding regions. Our forecasts cover the next 24 hours and beyond, helping you plan outdoor activities, agricultural work, travel, and day-to-day tasks.
about.warningsText: Provided by the MeteoAlarm system, we display official meteorological warnings issued for Central Greece. When severe weather is approaching — extreme heat, strong winds, heavy rainfall, or frost — FWM shows active alerts clearly so you can take protective action early.
about.coverageText: Our coverage area includes the prefecture of Fthiotida and the broader regions of Central Greece & Thessaly, including major urban centers such as Lamia, Karpenisi, Stylida, Domokos, and Atalanti, as well as rural, agricultural, and mountainous communities. Whether you need the latest reading from a local station or a regional overview, FWM provides the weather data you need.
